title: Marksman Automatic Electronic Water Timer - Garden Hose Watering Timer | Irrigation System, Plant Timing, Outdoor Gardening Tool, Feeding Plants | Auto Switch, Monitoring Program
features: IRRIGATION SYSTEM - The timer can be used to set a watering program for your garden, so that sprinklers and irrigation systems switch on automatically. a perfect way to monitor and feed your plants without any hassle or worry. a great addition to your garden.

EASY TO USE - It can run cycles at any time of day or night, for any amount of time, to make watering your garden easy and simple. Ideal for programming a watering schedule for your garden, Can run up to 24 cycles a day Easy to program, Requires 2 AAA batteries (not included). Instructions manual included

ADJUST TO YOUR NEEDS - Ideal for watering plants when on holiday or leaving your garden unattended. Packed in a blister with full colour artwork. Adapt the watering frequency and duration of each hose to your specific requirements.

OUTDOOR USE - The water timer is completely waterproof, anti-UV, and anti-drop thanks to its premium ABS shell. To guarantee the long-term operation of the controller's internal structure, a high-density stainless steel filter built into the water input will prevent the water's contaminants. It may efficiently conserve water while guaranteeing that plants receive enough of it.
description: Marksman Automatic Electronic Water Timer - Garden Hose Watering Timer | Irrigation System, Plant Timing, Outdoor Gardening Tool, Feeding Plants | Auto Switch, Monitoring Program
